hero.eyebrow: two engineers, one terminal, synced in real time
hero.sub: Ditch screen shares. Nexus is the real-time canvas where engineers prepare, collaborate, and execute. Every cursor, sheet, and concept synced instantly in a premium unified terminal.

trust.label: TRUSTED BY ENGINEERS PREPARING FOR MODERN TECHNICAL INTERVIEWS

problem.sub: Standard screen shares, video calls, and remote editors weren't built for pair programming. Nexus introduces a purpose-built workspace that handles code, context, and problems in sync.
problem.today_item_1: Video stream with zero code interactivity
problem.today_item_3: Discord or Slack logs where code context gets lost
problem.today_item_5: No unified review after the session finishes
problem.nexus_item_1: One shared room, one link, unified editor state
problem.nexus_item_2: Import tasks from LeetCode instantly with metadata
problem.nexus_item_3: Integrated Notes canvas that persists session-wide
problem.nexus_item_4: Personal sheets for parallel drafts that stay aligned

features.title: Built for actual problem solving
features.sub: Remove every layer of friction between writing a draft and submitting the final solution.
features.editor_desc: The identical editing fidelity of VS Code—IntelliSense, syntax highlights, and six runtimes in your web browser.
features.cursor_desc: Observe exactly where your partner is typing. Active sheets, selections, and edits are shared instantly with zero lag.
features.sheets_desc: Create default public sheets visible to everyone, or spin up private custom sheets restricted to specific users.
features.import_desc: Paste any LeetCode problem link. Descriptions, test cases, and constraints parse directly into the sidebar.
features.run_desc: Test your solution instantly against standard or customized test cases. Complete logs, runtimes, and errors included.
features.chat_desc: Keep discussions contextual. Share ideas and code blocks inside the workspace without opening external chat apps.

showcase.title: Flexible sheets. Custom access.
showcase.sub: Keep sheets open to everyone by default, or restrict access to select users during creation.
showcase.shared_desc: By default, any sheet created is public and visible to all participants in the room. Perfect for group brainstorming and live collaboration.
showcase.personal_desc: Limit visibility to specific users while creating the sheet. Keep your draft workspace private or share it with only a select group of collaborators.
showcase.notes_desc: A shared text canvas where everyone can brainstorm, trace complexities, and note edge cases during the session.
showcase.final_desc: Instantly create new sheets or delete old ones to keep the session organized. Control access permissions on the fly as your team expands.

stats.langs_label: JS · TS · PY · JAVA · C++ · GO

workflow.title: From invite link to finished solution
workflow.step_1_desc: Configure roles and share the secure invite link with your partner.
workflow.step_2_desc: Provide a LeetCode URL. Specifications populate the workspace layout instantly.
workflow.step_3_desc: Collaborate on default public sheets, or spin up private sheets restricted to select partners.
workflow.step_4_desc: Test the solution against runtime test cases and save notes inside the persistent workspace.

quote.text: Nexus solved the barrier between speaking and writing code. It is the first platform where context and code reside together.
quote.author: — Engineering Lead, collaborative prep cohort

final_cta.sub: No screen-share lag, no complex server steps—just a clean collaborative room built for engineering teams.

footer.tagline: The collaborative workspace for coding interviews, DSA practice, and pair programming — built for the way engineers actually solve problems together.

login.title: Sign in — Nexus
login.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to request a reset code
login.reset_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code and your new password
login.terms_note: By continuing, you agree to Nexus's Terms and Privacy Policy.
login.eyebrow: the room where you both think out loud
login.stage_desc: Every keystroke, selection, and idea is synced instantly. This is what your next pairing session looks like.

dashboard.workspaces_subtitle: Create or join real-time coding collaborative sessions
dashboard.no_workspaces_desc: Get started by creating a new collaborative workspace and importing a problem or invite your friends using invite codes.
dashboard.no_friends_added: No friends added yet. Start searching to send a request!

workspace_detail.environment_placeholder: This is a placeholder page for the collaboration room. In the next phase, Yjs synchronization, Socket.IO cursors, and Monaco editor instance will be mounted in this zone!
